base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of font_dialogue_uppercase — a ui (typography) from 1986 legend of zelda. Uppercase dialogue font — A-Z + 0-9. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Uppercase dialogue font — A-Z + 0-9; used for NPC dialogue in caves ('IT'S DANGEROUS TO GO ALONE! TAKE THIS.')
